default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: My services don't come cheap. Summoning me in such a brusque manner... I take it you've already decided on a destination?

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: Once you board my caravan, there's no turning back.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: Finally... I can take a nice long break...

default.title: Level Start
default.text: I suppose I can humor you for a bit.

default.title: Victory
default.text: Don't worry. I've taken care of everything. It's all over now.

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: How dare you raid my dock?

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: The end is nigh!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: Heh, it's just... the bitter end of reality.

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Have you forgotten that I'm a smuggler? Coming to my place so often—aren't you even a little afraid I'll whisk you away someday? Hmm… I wonder how much ransom the MBCC would pay to get you back...

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: Even "dreams" come with a price tag. People are willing to pay astronomical sums to achieve theirs—those who hesitate are just looking for a better deal.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Whenever our caravan passes through DisCity customs, a beautiful chime rings out. I must let you hear it sometime... It's the sound of dreams shattering against reality.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: For the right price, my caravan can transport anyone to any place in the world. But, whether the client is still breathing upon arrival... well, that's not something I can guarantee.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Don't mourn for the treasures buried in WhiteSands. Désir's ebb and flow is just the nature of these end times. How about we share a laugh and bid them all farewell?

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: If you want to be like me—freely roaming WhiteSands, owning a cozy hideaway, and able to enjoy Eastside desserts whenever I please—remember this: people's hearts are your most valuable asset. Hold them close, and don't hesitate to use them.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: It's a shame that I'm enjoying such lovely weather all alone. Why don't you toss aside your work for a bit as well? Let's just sit quietly together without thinking about anything, and watch the crowds come and go...

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: If one day the name Vautour Bleu vanishes from WhiteSands, heed my advice: don't go searching for her. She's just flown too long, too far, and needs to rest her wings. Your well-wishes will suffice. Pray for her... to find a nest to call home.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Oh dear, you're daydreaming again... Aren't you worried I might sell you off to the Outlands?

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Young people really can't help themselves... Heh, want me to help you?

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Didn't get your fill earlier? Come closer then, get a better look.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Let's see what's got our little Chief so wound up, shall we?

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Oh, silly. Don't tell me you're swayed by such trifling perks?

default.title: Level Up
default.text: For me? Heh, how thoughtful of you.

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: Someone is getting more brazen by the day.

languor_en_bleu.title: Attire Obtained
languor_en_bleu.text: This silk and these treasures were all brought back by my caravan from Eastia. If anything catches your eye, feel free to take it. I've always been generous to those close to my heart.

languor_en_bleu.title: Level Up
languor_en_bleu.text: Your thoughtfulness means more to me than all this fine porcelain.

languor_en_bleu.title: Greeting
languor_en_bleu.text: I haven't even warmed up this silk gown yet, and you've already disturbed my lovely afternoon nap. Tell me, how do you plan to make it up to me?

languor_en_bleu.title: Pat Head
languor_en_bleu.text: Even the smoke from the incense burner knows to drift away from me, yet you... only you dare to be so bold.

languor_en_bleu.title: Ordinary Contact 1
languor_en_bleu.text: Those little creatures are chirping and squabbling again. I hear these birds are supposed to be an auspicious sign. Just a marketing gimmick. If you're interested, I could spin similar tales for you. I have an endless supply of these hope-inspiring rumors, so many we could talk for days and nights without running out.

languor_en_bleu.title: Ordinary Contact 2
languor_en_bleu.text: Each artifact here has its own story. The carvings, drawings, fingerprints, even the cracks, they all form part of that narrative. It's just a shame... not a single one of these stories has a happy ending.

languor_en_bleu.title: Ordinary Contact 3
languor_en_bleu.text: I love those Eastians' way with words: sorrow smoke, purple haze, pining herb... With words alone, they can forever preserve the essence and memories of their homeland. It's truly enviable.

languor_en_bleu.title: Ordinary Contact 4
languor_en_bleu.text: What are you staring at? Is it the luster of this Eastian silk, or... what it's covering? Who would have thought our little Chief could get so greedy?

languor_en_bleu.title: Idle
languor_en_bleu.text: The sun feels so nice, bet you're feeling like a nap too. There's still room on the daybed, come, join me.

languor_en_bleu.title: Special Attention
languor_en_bleu.text: By merchant customs, anyone who visits Vautour Bleu's territory must leave something behind. But since you're skilled in neither fine brushwork nor the art of tea... Why not serve as my prized trophy instead? Here, keep me company while I rest.

vin_nocturne.title: Attire Obtained
vin_nocturne.text: I see you've been particularly compliant today. How about I reward you with a relaxing petal bath? Consider it... my unconditional favoritism toward those who behave.

vin_nocturne.title: Upgrade
vin_nocturne.text: You can repay me later. For now, just indulge yourself... the night is still young.

vin_nocturne.title: Greeting
vin_nocturne.text: The evening breeze is just blowing through the window curtains, and the other side of the river is lit up just right... You always manage to appear when my heart is at its softest.

vin_nocturne.title: Pat Head
vin_nocturne.text: Such a gesture tends to make people overthink... or was that on purpose?

vin_nocturne.title: Ordinary Contact 1
vin_nocturne.text: I've put quite a bit of thought into the decorations. The candles, the scenery, and the wine glasses. The only thing missing is someone next to me in the bathtub. I've tested the water for you. It's just right...

vin_nocturne.title: Ordinary Contact 2
vin_nocturne.text: Some call this city romantic, but when night falls, you're the only one willing to spend time with me under the stars. I should thank you for honoring the invitation. At least you prove that romance is not dead in this metropolis.

vin_nocturne.title: Ordinary Contact 3
vin_nocturne.text: It's getting mistier and steamier in here. Do I look like I'm behind a veil to you now? Heh... Haziness and distance often cloud one's judgment.

vin_nocturne.title: Ordinary Contact 4
vin_nocturne.text: Would you believe me if I told you it was black tea in the glass? Be wise, don't drink too much. Young ones like you can easily get reckless after a glass.

vin_nocturne.title: Idle
vin_nocturne.text: What a beautiful night. So beautiful it doesn't seem real. No wonder so many work so hard just to get a glimpse of this...

vin_nocturne.title: Special Attention
vin_nocturne.text: I heard the fragrance lingers on your skin after a rose bath. Want to test if it's true with me?
